properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He said, "I've been where you've been before. Down every hallway's a slamming door." No way out, no one to come and save me Wasting a life that the Good Lord gave me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then somebody said what I'm saying to you Opened my eyes and told me the truth." They said, "Just a little faith, it'll all get better." So I followed that preacher man down to the river

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And now I'm changed And now I'm stronger

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There must've been something in the water Oh, there must've been something in the water

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Well, I heard what he said and I went on my way Didn't think about it for a couple of days Then it hit me like a lightning late one night I was all out of hope and all out of fight

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Couldn't fight back the tears so I fell on my knees Saying, "God, if you're there come and rescue me." Felt love pouring down from above Got washed in the water, washed in the blood

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There must be something in the water Oh, there must be something in the water

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And now I'm singing along to amazing grace Can't nobody wipe this smile off my face Got joy in my heart, angels on my side Thank God almighty, I saw the light Gonna look ahead, no turning back Live everyday, give it all that I have Trust in someone bigger than me Ever since the day that I believed

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I am changed And now I'm stronger

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: There must be something in the water Oh, there must be something in the water Oh, there must be something in the water Oh, there must be something in the water

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, yeah I am changed Stronger
